pages.ocr_text: Topic: Source grounded reporting\n\nA manafest records each source file, checksum, and processing status. The report should cite the segment that supports each claim.
Topic: Conservative cleanup\n\nCleanup may fix obvious OCR errrors and spacing, but it must not invent missing details. If a formula or term is [unclear], keep the marker.
Topic: Corpus preparation\n\nAfter review, cleaned notes become short corpus segmnts with stable citations for retrival and reporting.
